references._setup: Place 5-7 clear photos in profiles/me/references/ on your machine. Name them descriptively (front.jpg, left_angle.jpg, etc). The worker picks from default_set when a 'me' recipe runs.

quality.identity_threshold: the output must be recognizably the same person as the reference photos
quality.postability_threshold: sharp, well-lit, no artifacts, ready to post without editing
